CustomField.formula: CASE(Originating_Creditor__c, "Bank of Nova Scotia", "Bank of Nova Scotia", "BNS", "Bank of Nova Scotia", "BNS-Tangerine", "Tangerine Bank", "CUETS", "CUETS", "Fidem Financial", "Fidem Finance Inc.", "MBNA", "MBNA (a division of the Toronto-Dominion Bank)", "TD CANADA TRUST", "TD Canada Trust", Originating_Creditor__c)
CustomField.label: Display Seller
